data.body:
[Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment Preview]

A Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment will begin on 4/7 (Tue)!

💌Pick-Up Students: 3★ Meru & 2★ Momiji, 3★ Minori, 3★ Shigure (Hot Spring), 3★ Serika (Swimsuit)
🗓️Pick-Up Recruitment Schedule: 4/7 (Tue) After Maintenance – 4/21 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)
